Catalog/Joint Replacement/Freedom Total Knee System - Patella Component
🦿 ArthroplastyREF: MRL-FTK-007

Freedom Total Knee System - Patella Component

Freedom Total Knee System · Knee Patellar Components

Patellar component for Freedom Total Knee System. Designed for optimal tracking and articulation with femoral component. Features anatomical shape and secure fixation mechanism for long-term stability.

MaterialUHMWPE (Ultra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene)
Frequently Asked Questions

Patellar component for Freedom Total Knee System. Designed for optimal tracking and articulation with femoral component. Features anatomical shape and secure fixation mechanism for long-term stability.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Freedom Total Knee System - Patella Component, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Freedom Total Knee System - Patella Component is constructed using UHMWPE (Ultra High Molecular Weight Polyethylene), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
